title: Byers Gill Solar Order 2025: correction of errors, Planning Act 2008
body: "On 24 October 2025 the Secretary of State issued a Correction Order and a Correction Notice to make corrections to the Byers Gill Solar Development.  The Correction Order comes into force on 27 October 2025.  Date of decision  24 October 2025  Company/location   RWE Renewables UK Solar and Storage LimitedWindmill Hill Business Park Swindon Wiltshire SN5 6PB   Minimum output  180 MW  "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
